UserProject.title: UserProject
UserProject.description: A representation of an AI-generated website design created by a logged-in user, stored securely in an isolated subcollection.

projectId.description: Unique alphanumeric ID of the project.

userId.description: The UID of the user owning this project.

name.description: The custom title of the generated design.

description.description: Synopsis of the layout and purpose.

css.description: The custom CSS rules and styles.

updatesCount.description: Total number of code edits or updates.

visitorsCount.description: Total simulated or actual public views count.

isPublished.description: Whether this project is published instantly.

publishedUrl.description: The unique public URL mapped for direct access.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last edit.

users/{userId}/projects/{projectId}.description: User specific subcollection containing their AI-generated premium web projects.
